candidates.why: Primary top-line sales label; matches definition of total revenue and equals Total Revenue numerically. Prefer simple 'Revenue' as first priority.
Explicit total revenue line with same values as 'Revenue'; included as fallback in case label changes over time.
Standard COGS label; matches the direct cost of revenues and equals the Cost of Revenues - Total.
Component of cost of revenues, but less complete than 'Cost of sales', so used only if primary line missing.

candidates.row_label: Net other operating income and expenses
candidates.why: Other operating items, not core COGS; not preferred unless no direct cost line existed.
Overhead SG&A, not COGS; excluded from COGS mapping.
Overhead SG&A component, not direct COGS in this presentation.
Selling expense (SG&A), not COGS.
Overhead SG&A component, not COGS.
Net operating subtotal, not pure COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Net other operating income and expenses
candidates.why: Other operating items; may include some overhead but also income, so not ideal as SG&A core.
Main SG&A bucket, but appears to be a total/subtotal; components are available and preferred per instructions.
Component of SG&A overhead expenses; good SG&A component line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: D&A within SG&A; explicitly excluded from XSGA by instructions, so should not be selected despite being in candidate list.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A is clearly presented via detailed overhead components (Employee Compensation, legal fees, advertising, etc.). Per instructions, component rows are preferred over totals such as 'Administrative Expenses', and D&A must be excluded. Therefore I excluded 'Administrative Expenses' (a subtotal) and 'Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' (D&A), and instead selected multiple granular overhead lines, including stock-based compensation. This required going beyond the provided candidate list, hence manual review is recommended to confirm the chosen component set. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee Compensation, [Income Statement] Legal and professional fees, [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Advertising Expense, [Income Statement] Management Remuneration, [Income Statement] Auditor Fees, [Income Statement] Audit-Related Fees, [Income Statement] Tax Fees, [Income Statement] Auditor Fees - Other, [Income Statement] Stock-Based Compensation Expense - Pre-tax - Supplemental
No research & development related line item appears in the Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews (no R&D, research, or development expense labels). XRD is therefore treated as zero.

candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; included only as a last-resort label if no expense lines existed.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense related to lease liabilities; good secondary choice if main interest expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental interest expense disclosure; useful as a fallback label over time.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not an interest line; should not be used for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Priority list favors explicit interest expense lines. 'Financial expenses' is added as a broader backup interest/finance cost line in case specific interest labels are missing for some periods. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Financial expenses

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not a balance sheet equity level; not appropriate for BE.
Balance sheet total equity; no separate parent/owner equity line is provided, so this is the best available proxy for book equity.
Duplicate total equity line with identical values and different casing; only one is needed to avoid duplication.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not actual equity; should not be used.
Total assets/equity+liabilities, not equity itself.

variables.notes: There is no separate line for 'Equity attributable to owners/parent'; thus 'Total equity' is used for BE in line with the instructions. No distinct non-controlling interests line exists, so BE implicitly includes any such interests (if present).

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Refers to comprehensive income before minority interest, not the balance sheet carrying amount of minority interest; therefore not suitable for MIB.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for non-controlling interests/minority interest is present (e.g., 'Non-controlling interests', 'Minority interest'). Therefore MIB is set to an empty list (treated as zero), consistent with instructions when only total equity is reported.
